headline: Kash Patel Invites FBI Agents To Train With Professional Pickup Artists
excerpt: QUANTICO, VA—Alarmed by what he described as the inability of supposedly elite law enforcement officers to approach and seduce attractive women, FBI director Kash Patel confirmed Thursday that he had invited all agents at the bureau to train with professional pickup artists. “The sad fact is that few, if any, federal agents use the three-second rule […] The post Kash Patel Invites FBI Agents To Train With Professional Pickup Artists appeared first on The Onion .

headline: NBC Unveils Interactive Chicago Pop-Up To Promote Procedural Franchise

headline: Trump Sees Hunter Biden   Smoking Crack On Wing Of Air Force One
